name: enforce-mcp-dayz
description: MCP Server for DayZ Enforce Script - semantic search and validation for vanilla scripts

scripts.search:rpc: npm run index -- search "rpc send to client" --entity-type method
scripts.start:easy: npm run build && npm run verify:index && npm run start
scripts.quickstart: npm install && npm run build && npm run index:world && npm run verify:index
